mapper.select: SELECT champion_code "championCode",name_en "nameEn",name_ko "nameKo" FROM champion WHERE active_yn=true ORDER BY name_ko

SELECT champion_code "championCode",name_en "nameEn",name_ko "nameKo" FROM champion WHERE active_yn=true AND ( LOWER(champion_code)=LOWER(#{value}) OR LOWER(name_en)=LOWER(#{value}) OR name_ko=#{value} ) LIMIT 1
